original:
This change updates the retry policy in src/http_client.py.
This is a routine internal change with no external API impact.
Previously the client retried failed requests up to 3 times with a fixed 1 second delay.
Now it retries up to 5 times using exponential backoff starting at 200ms.
It stops retrying immediately if the response carries error code AUTH_EXPIRED, forwarding that error unchanged.
Reviewers should double check this matches src/auth/session.py.
